title: Harmonia prior
description: A version-pinned, citable prior for the v0.2 hierarchical Bayesian dose-response inference. A prior is a declared input, not a hidden choice (spec v0.2 sec 7): every posterior names the prior it was inferred under, and prior_sensitivity is reported so a prior-dominated number is visible. No prior may carry a risk conclusion (predictive MUST be false).

m_0_log10nm.description: prior mean of the true log10 IC50 (nM)

s_0_log10nm.description: prior SD of the true log10 IC50 (nM)

scale_log10.description: HalfNormal scale of the between-lab SD (log10 nM)

mu.description: lognormal mu of the Hill coefficient

block_sigma.description: fractional-block observation noise for the one-sided (top-dose-censored) likelihood
